dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4650 IS: Improving Pest and Disease Preparedness for Specialty Crops Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schiff introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Plant Protection Act to improve plant pest and disease preparedness for specialty crops.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Improving Pest and Disease Preparedness for Specialty Crops Act.

section.header: Plant pest and disease management and disaster prevention
section.text: Section 420 of the Plant Protection Act (7 U.S.C. 7721) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (b), by adding at the end the following:
In using funds made available to carry out this section, the Secretary shall prioritize cooperative agreements under this subsection to carry out activities under this subsection in high-risk States.

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (6), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (7), by striking and each fiscal year thereafter. and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: $150,000,000 for fiscal year 2027 and each fiscal year thereafter.
in subsection (g), by striking $5,000,000 and inserting $12,000,000.
